title: SubscriptionPayloadDetail

deliveryProtocol.description:
The supported delivery protocol of the notification topic.

Note: HTTPS is currently the only supported delivery protocol of all notification topics. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

format.description:
The supported data format of the payload.

Note: JSON is currently the only supported format for all notification topics. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

schemaVersion.description: The supported schema version for the notification topic. See the supportedPayloads.schemaVersion field for the topic in getTopics or getTopic response.

description: A type that describes the details of the subscription payload.
